channel.title: Tools on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Nature Works

item.title: Tools of the Trade
item.description:
These are my most favourite tools, really here for my own reference!

Most used & favourite Felco 2 secateurs with Housolution polyurethane sheath Silky F180 folding saw, with replaceable blade Niwaki hori-hori knife & canvas sheath Showa 350R 10/XL gloves Spear & Jackson solid socket tree spade Wishlist Silky Zubat 330 with belt clip scabbard Niwaki GR Pro secateurs http://localhost:1313/blog/231014-tools-of-the-trade/
